## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` is clean
- [ ] `npm test` is green
- [ ] No secrets added; configuration stays env-based
- [ ] If I touched `src/lib/trust/`, I added/extended a test proving the invariant
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or architecture changed
- [ ] The app still runs fully without the optional Aweb backend (graceful degrade)
